@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "Controller" {
    class MainController <<C>> 
}

package "Model" {
    class User <<C>>
    class MedList <<C>>
    class Calendar <<C>>
    class Day <<C>>
    class Food <<C>>
    class Reminder <<C>>
    class Task <<C>>
    class Med <<C>>
    class Disease <<C>>
    class UserAppearenceInfo <<C>>
    
    ' Relationships within Model
    
    %% Aggregations from User to other classes in model
    User --|> MedList : has > 1..*  
    note right of this line: The user owns one or more medication lists. 
    
    User --> Calendar : contains >> *   
     note left of this link:\nA calendar can contain many days.\nThe day belongs exclusively\n(to be deleted if removed). 

     


   }



' Inheritance relationships for DAOs under DataBase section below...  

note bottom on DAODisease \nas subclass implementing specific logic related diseases data access operations etc., similar pattern applies elsewhere too! 


@enduml
